title: Airbender Glider
description: Changes the Elytra model to an Airbender Glider from Avatar The Last Airbender.
body:
# Airbender Glider
This mod changes the Elytra model to an Airbender Glider from Avatar The Last Airbender. It's a client side mod that doesn't change the behaviour of the Elytra, making it usable even on your favorite servers! Everyone wearing an Elytra will now instead also use the Airbender Glider, not just yourself. It's perfect for those who want to feel like an airbender in any world you play.

The Airbender Glider model only shows up when you are flying with it, if you are not flying, the Airbender Glider will turn into a pole attached to your back. The pole can be disabled in the Skin Customization settings, but will not replace it with the Airbender Glider model.

The Airbender Glider will **not** use your cape as a texture, instead the cape is kept on your back while flying, even though its mostly hidden by the larger Airbender Glider model.

# Planned
- NeoForge version
- Forge version
- 1.21.1 version
- 1.20.1 version
